description:
sometimes the main agent stops like this: 
We are currently experiencing high demand.                                                                                      │
│ We apologize and appreciate your patience.                                                                                      │
│ /model to switch models.                                                                                                        │
│                                                                                                                                 │
│                                                                                                                                 │
│ ● 1. Keep trying                                                                                                                │
│   2. Stop          

<end of snippet>

if this is the case, we should wait 30 seconds then retry, if we hit again, wait another 60 seconds then 120 seconds and so on * 2 always until it continues (stops on something different) - in this case: we reset to 30 seconds.

We need a separate action besides "stop" and "text-prompt" or "option"  for detecting the high demand situation: "cooldown"

so we should add that in kennel/.gemini/GEMINI.md
